title: Offices of Real Estate Agents and Brokers

labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 531210 ($30,836,359,913) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 531210 ($180,013,344,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.0396 (margins.json[53]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Real Estate (Operations & Services) EBITDA/Sales 3.96% (agency/brokerage/property-management economics, dominant in firm counts)); revenue/employee $432,174 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 531210); class <5: 140,557 firms, avg revenue/firm $449,562 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $17,803 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 6,638 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,862,814 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $113,367 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 2,095 firms, avg revenue/firm $6,465,620 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $256,039 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 1,204 firms, avg revenue/firm $16,484,213 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $652,775 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 259 firms, avg revenue/firm $48,286,429 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,912,143 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 139 firms, avg revenue/firm $373,541,367 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $14,792,238 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 259
